# AEGIS Forecast Drift — Top Scenarios

Governed forecast drift monitoring — **V2** snapshot (read-only).

### Purpose
Ranking of **scenarios** by drift, kept in the architecture for future multi-scenario snapshots.

### Status
🚧 **Structural shell** created in **E7D.0**. Analytical panels will be built in **E7D.10**.

### Data source
Governed **V2** snapshot (read-only) via datasource `aegis-forecast-drift-csv` — `forecast_drift_signals.csv` (`scenario`).

### Known data limitations
The governed snapshot currently contains **only one scenario: `Enterprise`** (1 value). This ranking will be single-row until additional scenarios appear; no global `scenario` filter is created while a single value exists.
